# transcript-api

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Agent API: GET /api/conversations/:id/transcript returns the on-disk JSONL path for a conversation's full raw Claude session transcript.
- Exports (shared):
  - Values: `getConversationTranscript`
- Server:
  - Uses: `tasks-core.getConversationClaudeSessionId`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
